member.name: T:Prime.TestMethods.VminSearch.DataLogger
member.summary: A class to provide access to data-logging functionality.

member.name: M:Prime.TestMethods.VminSearch.DataLogger.LogVminForwardingDataForTrace(System.Collections.Generic.List{System.ValueTuple{System.Double,System.Int32,System.String}},Prime.SessionService.ISessionContextProviderContainer)
member.summary: Print Vmin forwarding configuration data to ituff. This printout consumed by Trace to configure Vmin Forwarding. Since search is executed for instances at the same corner , one frequency input value expected. e.g tname_VminTestName_vminFwCfg strgval_CRCORE7@F6:4:5.500_CRCORE6@F6:4:5.500_CRCORE5@F6:4:5.500_CRCORE4@F6:4:5.500. [domain][instanceName]@[CornerValue]:[FlowId]:[FrequencyValue].
member.param: List of frequency , flow , cornerId. each element in the List represents IP. e.g: {frequency: 55000 , flow: 3 , cornerId:CR_CORE4@F6}.
The session context of this operation.

members.member:
Logs the resulting voltages from the search as well as the start and end voltage values for all search targets. Logs the voltage limiting patterns when the patternNameMap is not empty. Logs the voltage increments per target when the option is enabled through the FeatureSwitchSettings parameter.
A list containing the accumulated data. Gets or sets a comma separated string of integers which map characters in the pattern name to produce a scoreboard counter.> Bool that indicates whether or not to print the increments per target.> Bool that indicates whether or not to print the limiter patterns occurrences.> The session context of this operation.

Logs the joined resulting voltages from the multi-pass search as well as the start and end voltage values for all search targets. Logs the voltage limiting patterns when the patternNameMap is not empty. Logs the voltage increments per target when the option is enabled through the FeatureSwitchSettings parameter.
A list containing the accumulated data. A comma separated string of integers which map characters in the pattern name to produce a scoreboard counter. Bool that indicates whether or not to print the increments per target. Bool that indicates whether or not to print the limiter patterns occurrences.> The session context of this operation.

member.name: M:Prime.TestMethods.VminSearch.DataLogger.MergeSearchResults(System.Collections.Generic.IEnumerable{Prime.TestMethods.VminSearch.SearchResultData},System.Boolean,System.Boolean)
member.summary: Merges the resulting voltages from the multi-pass search as well as the start and end voltage values of all search targets for data-logging purposes.
member.param: A list containing the results data to merge.
Bool that indicates whether or not to include Limiting Patterns data.
Bool that indicates whether or not to include the increments per target.
member.returns: The MergedSearchResultsData object containing all merged data.

member.name: M:Prime.TestMethods.VminSearch.DataLogger.GetMappedString(System.String,System.String)
member.summary: Returns a string containing the characters that are mapped by the provided index map.
member.param: The string from which to map the indexed characters.

A string with comma-separated integer indexes. Each index represents the position of a corresponding character in the string to map. Positive indexes starting at 0 map to characters at the start of the string to map and forward. Negative indexes starting at -1 map to characters at the end of the string to map and backwards.
member.returns: The string of characters that were mapped with the index map.

member.name: M:Prime.TestMethods.VminSearch.DataLogger.WriteLimitingPatternsOccurrencesToItuff(System.ValueTuple{System.ValueTuple{System.String[],System.String[]},System.String[]},System.String,System.String,Prime.SessionService.ISessionContextProviderContainer)
member.summary: Prints to the ituff file a format string containing the limiting patterns.

member.name: M:Prime.TestMethods.VminSearch.DataLogger.WritePerTargetIncrementsToItuff(System.UInt32[],System.String,Prime.SessionService.ISessionContextProviderContainer)
member.summary: Prints the voltage increments per target to the ituff.

member.name: T:Prime.TestMethods.VminSearch.DataLogger.MergedSearchResultData
member.summary: A struct to hold merged results data for data-logging purposes.

member.name: T:Prime.TestMethods.VminSearch.Helpers.BitArrayExtensions
member.summary: BitArrayExtensions.

member.name: M:Prime.TestMethods.VminSearch.Helpers.BitArrayExtensions.NumberOfTrue(System.Collections.BitArray)
member.summary: Return the number of true values in the BitArray.
member.param: bits to operate.
member.returns: count of true bits.

member.name: M:Prime.TestMethods.VminSearch.Helpers.BitArrayExtensions.NumberOfFalse(System.Collections.BitArray)
member.summary: Return the number of false values in the BitArray.
member.param: bits to operate.
member.returns: count of false bits.

member.name: M:Prime.TestMethods.VminSearch.Helpers.BitArrayExtensions.AndAll(System.Collections.BitArray)
member.summary: Return the logical And of all of the entries in the array.
member.param: bits to operate.
member.returns: Boolean result.

member.name: M:Prime.TestMethods.VminSearch.Helpers.BitArrayExtensions.OrAll(System.Collections.BitArray)
member.summary: Return the logical Or of all of the entries in the array.
member.param: bits to operate.
member.returns: Boolean result.

member.name: M:Prime.TestMethods.VminSearch.Helpers.BitArrayExtensions.ToString(System.Collections.BitArray,System.String,System.String,System.String)
member.summary: Return a string showing the BitArray's values.
member.param: bits to operate.
value to replace true bits.
value to replace false bits.
separator between each bit.
member.returns: BitArray converted string.

member.name: M:Prime.TestMethods.VminSearch.Helpers.BitArrayExtensions.ToStr(System.Collections.BitArray)
member.summary: Converts to str.
member.param: bits to operate.
member.returns: BitArray converted string.

member.name: M:Prime.TestMethods.VminSearch.Helpers.BitArrayExtensions.SequenceEqual(System.Collections.BitArray,System.Collections.BitArray)
member.summary: Determines whether two BitArrays are equal in length and bit by bit.
member.param: bits to operate.
bits to compare.
member.returns: BitArray converted string.

member.name: T:Prime.TestMethods.VminSearch.Helpers.DoubleExtensions
member.summary: Double extensions helper class to handle mathematical equations among doubles.

member.name: M:Prime.TestMethods.VminSearch.Helpers.DoubleExtensions.IsEqual(System.Double,System.Double)
member.summary: Method to compare two double values to check if they are equal within a precision of three decimals.
member.param: Value of interest.
Value to compare.
member.returns: A bool indicating if the two values are equal.

member.name: M:Prime.TestMethods.VminSearch.Helpers.DoubleExtensions.IsDifferent(System.Double,System.Double)
member.summary: Method to compare two double values to check if they are different within a precision of three decimals.
member.param: Value of interest.
Value to compare.
member.returns: A bool indicating if the two values are different.

member.name: T:Prime.TestMethods.VminSearch.Helpers.MultiMap`2
member.summary: Multimap helper class for a Dictionary with multiple values per key.

member.name: P:Prime.TestMethods.VminSearch.Helpers.MultiMap`2.Keys
member.summary: Gets the collection of keys.

member.name: P:Prime.TestMethods.VminSearch.Helpers.MultiMap`2.Item(`0)
member.summary: Indexer for keys.
member.param: Key value.
member.returns: List of elements.

member.name: M:Prime.TestMethods.VminSearch.Helpers.MultiMap`2.Add(`0,`1)
member.summary: Adds a value to the structure.
member.param: Key.
Value.

member.name: M:Prime.TestMethods.VminSearch.Helpers.MultiMap`2.KeyExists(`0)
member.summary: Checks if a key exists in the map.
member.param: The key value.
member.returns: True if the key exists.

member.name: T:Prime.TestMethods.VminSearch.IVminSearchExtensions
member.summary: Class to define extendable methods.

member.name: M:Prime.TestMethods.VminSearch.IVminSearchExtensions.GetSearchVoltageObject(System.Collections.Generic.List{System.String},System.String)

summary.para: 0.1. Called in Verify for voltage object initialization.
Default implementation returns a DPS or a FIVR (if FeatureSwitchSettings parameter value contains "fivr_mode_on") IVoltage object.

member.remarks: Returned object determines how the Voltages are applied.

param.name: targets
param.para: Target key names from current instance VoltageTargets parameter.
These will be used to apply search voltages to each of them with a a method that depends of the type of returned voltage object.

member.param: Plist name from current instance Patlist parameter.
member.returns: IVoltage object which must be created with one of the corresponding available options in VoltageService.
member.exception: If either of the parameters is invalid.

member.name: M:Prime.TestMethods.VminSearch.IVminSearchExtensions.GetFunctionalTest(System.String,System.String,System.String)

summary.para: 0.2. Called in Verify during initialization of SetPointTest object.
Default implementation returns an IFunctionalTest of type ICaptureFailureTest.

member.remarks: Returned object determines how plist is executed and which results are captured.
member.param: Plist name from current instance Patlist parameter.
Level name from current instance LevelsTc parameter.
Timing name from current instance TimingsTc parameter.
member.returns: IFunctionalTest object which must be created with one of the corresponding available options in FunctionalService.
member.exception: If either of the parameters is invalid.

members.member:
0.3. Called in Verify during initialization of SetPointTest object.
Default implementation returns false.
Returned boolean determines if the search continues or stops after execution of the first search point.
A True value returned by this method affects the behavior of the following extensions default implementation:
Extension Expected behavior when IsSinglePointMode returns True
ExecuteScoreboard Skips the final plist execution if the functional object is a Capture Failure type and per-pattern capture mode is enabled.
PostProcessSearchResults Does not print the search results to the ituff.
ApplySearchVoltage Skips execution
True if single point test mode should be executed instead of a complete search.>

0.4. Called in Verify during initialization of SetPointTest object.
Default implementation returns true.
Returned boolean determines if the base method evaluates extra rules on the result bits returned by ProcessPlistResults extension.
If the check is enabled and it fails the extension returned bits are ignored and replaced by an all bits failing result.
These extra checks includes verifying that masked positions are passing and there is at least on fail position if the plist fails.
True if it is intended to evaluate extra checking in the results bits returned by ProcessPlistResults extension.>

member.name: M:Prime.TestMethods.VminSearch.IVminSearchExtensions.GetBypassPort

summary.para: 0. Called at the beginning of the Execute. Allows the user to create a custom check for a complete instance bypass and returning a custom port.
Default implementation returns a -1, allowing the execution to continue as normal.

member.remarks:
Return value indicates the new bypass port for the test instance. The values returned could fall under the following categories:
Bypass port value Expected behavior of the test instance
Port value = -1 Continue execution as normal
Port value >= 0 Bypass execution and return port number
member.returns: An integer value indicating the bypass port.

member.name: M:Prime.TestMethods.VminSearch.IVminSearchExtensions.ApplyPreExecuteSetup(System.String)

summary.para: 1. Called before any other test method code in Execute.
Allows execution of any pre-instance required setup (for example variable initializations from external sources).

member.param: Plist name from current instance Patlist parameter, for optional use.

member.name: M:Prime.TestMethods.VminSearch.IVminSearchExtensions.ApplyInitialVoltage(Prime.VoltageService.IVoltage)

summary.para: 2. Called after level and timing test conditions are loaded at the beginning in Execute.
Default implementation calls to voltageObject.?Apply(), where voltageObject is valid only if FivrCondition parameter is defined.

member.remarks: Allows implementation of additional initial voltage setups.
member.param: IVoltage object that handle apply method, in FIVR mode only.

member.name: M:Prime.TestMethods.VminSearch.IVminSearchExtensions.ApplyPreSearchSetup(System.String)

summary.para: 3. Called as first step of each iteration of a for loop, which is intended to optionally execute more than one search.
Default implementation is left empty.

member.remarks: Allows execution of any pre-search required setup (for example setting a condition value that must be different for each search).
member.param: Plist name from current instance Patlist parameter, for optional use.

member.name: M:Prime.TestMethods.VminSearch.IVminSearchExtensions.GetStartVoltageValues(System.Collections.Generic.List{System.String})

summary.para: 4.1 Called as part of the SearchPointTest Reset() method which is called before entering into the search loop.
Default implementation calls StringUtilities.ConvertKeysToDouble(startVoltageKeys) to return a list of double values.

remarks.para: Allows replacing voltages values used for search start.
Keys in startVoltageKeys can be double format values or key names that for default implementation must already exist in the shared storage system as doubles.

member.param: List of key names taken from StartVoltages parameter.
member.returns: Voltage values to be used to start the search.

member.name: M:Prime.TestMethods.VminSearch.IVminSearchExtensions.GetLowerStartVoltageValues(System.Collections.Generic.List{System.String})

summary.para: 4.2. Called as part of the SearchPointTest IsSearchCompleted whenever overshoot required and enabled.
Default implementation calls StringUtilities.ConvertKeysToDouble(lowerStartVoltageKeys) to return a list of double values.

remarks.para: Allows initializing the lower start voltage values for the new search in the overshoot.
Keys in lowerStartVoltageKeys can be double format values or key names that for default implementation must already exist in the shared storage system as doubles.

member.param: List of key names taken from LowerStartVoltageKeys parameter.
member.returns: Lower start voltage values to be used in overshoot.

member.name: M:Prime.TestMethods.VminSearch.IVminSearchExtensions.GetEndVoltageLimitValues(System.Collections.Generic.List{System.String})

summary.para: 5. Called as part of the SearchPointTest Reset() method which is called before entering into the search loop.
Default implementation calls StringUtilities.ConvertKeysToDouble(endVoltageLimitKeys) to return a list of double values.

remarks.para: Allows replacing voltages values used for search end limit.
Keys in endVoltageLimitKeys can be double format values or key names that for default implementation must already exist in the shared storage system as doubles.

member.param: List of key names taken from EndVoltageLimits parameter.
member.returns: Voltage values to be used as search end limits.

member.name: M:Prime.TestMethods.VminSearch.IVminSearchExtensions.GetInitialMaskBits

summary.para: 6. Called as part of the SearchPointTest Reset() method which is called before entering into the search loop.
Default implementation returns a BitArray populated with the CurrentMultiPassMask.

member.remarks: Allows setting the initial mask value for the current search loop. This mask value is used to ignore (for the bits set to true) voltage increases for corresponding targets, which corresponding results are set to a default value of -8888.0..
member.returns: bit array to be used as initial search mask value.

member.name: M:Prime.TestMethods.VminSearch.IVminSearchExtensions.ApplySearchVoltage(Prime.VoltageService.IVoltage,System.Collections.Generic.List{System.Double})

summary.para: 7. Called before search point test execution.
Default implementation calls to IVoltage.Apply(voltageValues).

member.remarks: Allows to override or complement methodology for voltage apply.
member.param: Handler object for applying of the required voltages, Depending of the type chosen in Verify with GetSearchVoltageObject.
Voltage values required to be applied for current search point.

member.name: M:Prime.TestMethods.VminSearch.IVminSearchExtensions.ApplyMask(System.Collections.BitArray,Prime.FunctionalService.IFunctionalTest)

summary.para: 8. Called before each search point plist execution.
Default implementation uses the IFunctionalTest to set a mask for all pins pass through MaskPins parameters.

remarks.para: Method to be implemented by the user to effectively apply a mask that makes the plist execution ignoring (not report) any fail for the masked target positions.

This method receives the internal required mask value (combination of initial mask and any other target that already reached to the search limit) but depending of the user implementation requirements the user can use other inputs.
The convention for this input is that a true in the bit array must be masked.

member.param: bit array with the value of current search point required mask.
functional test object to optionally be used to apply the mask in the case of a pin masking method.

member.name: M:Prime.TestMethods.VminSearch.IVminSearchExtensions.ProcessPlistResults(System.Boolean,Prime.FunctionalService.IFunctionalTest)

summary.para: 9. Called after each search point plist execution.
Default implementation returns all bits in true if plistExecuteResult is false, or all bits in false if plistExecuteResult is true.

remarks.para: Method to be implemented by the user to decode plist results into a bit array.
This returned bit array will be used by the test method to decide which targets must increase voltage for next search point.
The convention is that a true in the bit array correspond to a fail position and so will be increased or disabled (if reached to the limit) for next search point.

member.param: Result of previous plist execution (IFunctionalTest.Execute), true for a passing case and false for a failing one.
Functional test object that provide methods to extract captured data from previous plist execution.
member.returns: BitArray populated with the bit results of the plist execution.

member.name: M:Prime.TestMethods.VminSearch.IVminSearchExtensions.ExecuteScoreboard(System.String,System.Boolean)

summary.para: 10. Called whenever a search is completed.
Decides whether to do a scoreboard execution or generate scoreboard counters depending on isSinglePointExecution, isSinglePointMode and failureTest values.

remarks.para: If IsSinglePointMode = true and per-pattern capture mode is enabled only the Scoreboard counters are printed to ituff (without plist re-execution). Otherwise the Scoreboard execution is called.
Execution happens only if the plist failed at least once.

member.param: String of the form MxRy. Where x is the multi pass execution count and y is the repetition count.
Indicates whether the last search point passed or failed.

members.member:
11. Called whenever a search is completed to determine if repetition is required or not.
Default implementation returns false.
Accumulated results from all completed searches. A boolean value indicating if search needs to be repeated or not.>

member.name: M:Prime.TestMethods.VminSearch.IVminSearchExtensions.HasToContinueToNextSearch(System.Collections.Generic.List{Prime.TestMethods.VminSearch.SearchResultData},Prime.FunctionalService.IFunctionalTest)

summary.para: 12. Called as last step of a single search.
Default implementation returns true to allow next search state to be executed.

remarks.para: Allows abortion of any remaining search executions (configured through MultipleSearchStates parameter).
The input provided to take this decision are the accumulated results for all searches executed from the list of states until the current completed search.
Each search result object contains final data from each previous search, like final voltage results, final mask, limiting patterns, start voltages, search end limits, and pass/fail search result.
A second input provided to optionally be used to take the decision is the functional test object to query the captured data from last search point plist execution.

member.param: Accumulated results from all already completed searches.
Functional test object that provide methods to extract captured data from last search plist execution.
member.returns: A boolean indicating whether the test method has to continue with next search state or not.

members.member:
13. Called after all searches are completed.
Default implementation returns 1 if at least on search passed or 0 if all searches failed to find any passing voltage value.
Allows overriding of the returned port of the test instance (with the exception of the case where the plist execution didn't end any of the searches with a pass result at the corresponding last search point).
One of the main usages of this extension would be to export the final voltage results for any required usage beyond the test instance boundaries.
Each search result object contains final data from each previous search, like final voltage results, final mask, limiting patterns, start voltages, search end limits, and pass/fail search result.
accumulated results from all completed searches.> A value indicating the exit port.>

member.name: F:Prime.TestMethods.VminSearch.PrimeVminSearchTestMethod.VoltageFailValue
member.summary: Value assigned to failing voltages.

member.name: F:Prime.TestMethods.VminSearch.PrimeVminSearchTestMethod.VoltageMaskValue
member.summary: Value assigned to masked targets.

member.name: F:Prime.TestMethods.VminSearch.PrimeVminSearchTestMethod.NoLimitingPatternToken
member.summary: String to be printed when no limiting pattern is found.

member.name: M:Prime.TestMethods.VminSearch.PrimeVminSearchTestMethod.#ctor
member.summary: Initializes a new instance of the class.

member.name: M:Prime.TestMethods.VminSearch.PrimeVminSearchTestMethod.#ctor(Prime.BusinessLogic.ScoreboardLogger.IScoreboardFactory)
member.summary: Initializes a new instance of the class.
member.param: A IScoreboardFactory for dependency injection.

member.name: T:Prime.TestMethods.VminSearch.PrimeVminSearchTestMethod.ExecutionModeFlag
member.summary: Execution Mode Flag, indicating which mode to apply with the search.

member.name: F:Prime.TestMethods.VminSearch.PrimeVminSearchTestMethod.ExecutionModeFlag.Search
member.summary: Search without ScoreBoard.

member.name: F:Prime.TestMethods.VminSearch.PrimeVminSearchTestMethod.ExecutionModeFlag.SearchWithScoreboard
member.summary: Search with ScoreBoard.

member.name: T:Prime.TestMethods.VminSearch.PrimeVminSearchTestMethod.PrintExecutionInfoOptions
member.summary: Indicates whether or not to print the failing patterns occurrences to ituff.

member.name: F:Prime.TestMethods.VminSearch.PrimeVminSearchTestMethod.PrintExecutionInfoOptions.Yes
member.summary: Print failing execution info to ituff.

member.name: F:Prime.TestMethods.VminSearch.PrimeVminSearchTestMethod.PrintExecutionInfoOptions.No
member.summary: Don't print failing execution info to ituff.

members.member:
************ Start Of PH Parameters ************
Gets or sets Patlist to execute.

member.name: P:Prime.TestMethods.VminSearch.PrimeVminSearchTestMethod.LevelsTc
member.summary: Gets or sets level test condition to load.

member.name: P:Prime.TestMethods.VminSearch.PrimeVminSearchTestMethod.Prime#TestMethods#CommonParams#IApplyEndSequenceParameter#ApplyEndSequence
member.summary: Gets or sets the ApplyEndSequence at the end of the test.

member.name: P:Prime.TestMethods.VminSearch.PrimeVminSearchTestMethod.TimingsTc
member.summary: Gets or sets timing test condition to load.

member.name: P:Prime.TestMethods.VminSearch.PrimeVminSearchTestMethod.Prime#TestMethods#CommonParams#IPrePlistCommonParam#PrePlist
member.summary: Gets or sets the PrePlist callback to plist execution.

member.name: P:Prime.TestMethods.VminSearch.PrimeVminSearchTestMethod.MaskPins
member.summary: Gets or sets a comma separated string indicating which pins to mask.

member.name: P:Prime.TestMethods.VminSearch.PrimeVminSearchTestMethod.VoltageTargets
member.summary: Gets or sets voltage targets.

member.name: P:Prime.TestMethods.VminSearch.PrimeVminSearchTestMethod.StartVoltages
member.summary: Gets or sets startVoltageValues.

member.name: P:Prime.TestMethods.VminSearch.PrimeVminSearchTestMethod.EndVoltageLimits
member.summary: Gets or sets EndVoltageLimits.

member.name: P:Prime.TestMethods.VminSearch.PrimeVminSearchTestMethod.StartVoltagesForRetry
member.summary: Gets or sets lowerStartVoltages for overshoot.

member.name: P:Prime.TestMethods.VminSearch.PrimeVminSearchTestMethod.StepSize
member.summary: Gets or sets stepSize.

member.name: P:Prime.TestMethods.VminSearch.PrimeVminSearchTestMethod.FeatureSwitchSettings
member.summary: Gets or sets FeatureSwitchSettings.

member.name: P:Prime.TestMethods.VminSearch.PrimeVminSearchTestMethod.FivrCondition
member.summary: Gets or sets fivrCondition name.

member.name: P:Prime.TestMethods.VminSearch.PrimeVminSearchTestMethod.MultiPassMasks
member.summary: Gets or sets a list containing the mask bit arrays needed for multi pass capability. Example: "1100,0101" indicates that two multi pass will be executed. Where elements corresponding to "1" mean that target will be masked or ignored for the corresponding search.

member.name: P:Prime.TestMethods.VminSearch.PrimeVminSearchTestMethod.ScoreboardEdgeTicks
member.summary: Gets or sets the number of resolution ticks to step down when scoreboard mode is enabled.

member.name: P:Prime.TestMethods.VminSearch.PrimeVminSearchTestMethod.BaseNumbers
member.summary: Gets or sets a list of numbers to prefix the scoreboard counters.

member.name: P:Prime.TestMethods.VminSearch.PrimeVminSearchTestMethod.PatternNameCounterIndexes
member.summary: Gets or sets a comma separated string of integers which map characters in the pattern name to produce a scoreboard counter.

member.name: P:Prime.TestMethods.VminSearch.PrimeVminSearchTestMethod.MaxFailsNum
member.summary: Gets or sets the maximum number of fails that can be processed for scoreboard counters.

member.name: P:Prime.TestMethods.VminSearch.PrimeVminSearchTestMethod.MaxRepetitionCount
member.summary: Gets or sets the maximum number of times a search can be repeated for recovering purposes. This parameter is zero by default. Meaning, no repetition will be executed for any search.

member.name: P:Prime.TestMethods.VminSearch.PrimeVminSearchTestMethod.ExecutionMode
member.summary: Gets or sets execution mode, default behaviour is Search without scoreboard. In order to enable ScoreBoard : executionMode = SearchWithScoreboard and ScoreBoardBaseNum > 0.

member.name: P:Prime.TestMethods.VminSearch.PrimeVminSearchTestMethod.CurrentMultiPassMask
member.summary: Gets the current multi pass mask.

member.name: P:Prime.TestMethods.VminSearch.PrimeVminSearchTestMethod.VoltageValues
member.summary: Gets the voltage values required to be applied for current search point.

member.name: P:Prime.TestMethods.VminSearch.PrimeVminSearchTestMethod.SearchMask
member.summary: Gets an array containing the mask for each target at current search point.

member.name: P:Prime.TestMethods.VminSearch.PrimeVminSearchTestMethod.PointData
member.summary: Gets a list containing the point data for the current search point.

member.name: P:Prime.TestMethods.VminSearch.PrimeVminSearchTestMethod.InitialSearchMask
member.summary: Gets an array containing the initial search mask for each target at current search.

member.name: P:Prime.TestMethods.VminSearch.PrimeVminSearchTestMethod.ScoreboardPointTest
member.summary: Gets scoreboardPointTest.

member.name: P:Prime.TestMethods.VminSearch.PrimeVminSearchTestMethod.SearchStates
member.summary: Gets searchStates.

member.name: M:Prime.TestMethods.VminSearch.PrimeVminSearchTestMethod.ConvertKeysToDouble(System.Collections.Generic.IEnumerable{System.String},System.Int32)
member.summary: local implementation of former StringUtilities.ConvertKeysToDouble.
member.param: list of tokens.
Expected size.
member.returns: List of key values as doubles.

member.name: M:Prime.TestMethods.VminSearch.PrimeVminSearchTestMethod.BaseExecuteScoreboard(System.String,System.Boolean)
member.summary: Original ExecuteScoreboard implementation.
member.param: String of the form MxRy. Where x is the multi pass execution count and y is the repetition count.
Indicates whether the last search point passed or failed.

member.name: M:Prime.TestMethods.VminSearch.PrimeVminSearchTestMethod.BasePostProcessSearchResults(System.Collections.Generic.List{Prime.TestMethods.VminSearch.SearchResultData})
member.summary: Original PortProcessSearchResult implementation.
member.param: Result from all completed searches.
member.returns: A value indicating the exit port.

member.name: T:Prime.TestMethods.VminSearch.PrimeVminSearchTestMethod.PlistExecutionParameters
member.summary: Contains the parameters for the plist execution to create the Functional Service instance.

member.name: P:Prime.TestMethods.VminSearch.PrimeVminSearchTestMethod.PlistExecutionParameters.Patlist
member.summary: Gets or sets the pattern list name.

member.name: P:Prime.TestMethods.VminSearch.PrimeVminSearchTestMethod.PlistExecutionParameters.LevelsTc
member.summary: Gets or sets the test instance levels test condition.

member.name: P:Prime.TestMethods.VminSearch.PrimeVminSearchTestMethod.PlistExecutionParameters.TimingsTc
member.summary: Gets or sets the test instance timings test condition.

member.name: P:Prime.TestMethods.VminSearch.PrimeVminSearchTestMethod.PlistExecutionParameters.MaskPins
member.summary: Gets or sets the callback to run before the plist execution.

member.name: T:Prime.TestMethods.VminSearch.PrimeVminSearchTestMethod.SearchExecutionStates
member.summary: Contains the test method variables that hold dynamic states of the searches execution.

member.name: P:Prime.TestMethods.VminSearch.PrimeVminSearchTestMethod.SearchExecutionStates.MultiPassCount
member.summary: Gets or sets the multi-pass iteration count.

member.name: P:Prime.TestMethods.VminSearch.PrimeVminSearchTestMethod.SearchExecutionStates.IsAnySearchPassing
member.summary: Gets or sets a value indicating whether any search is passing.

member.name: P:Prime.TestMethods.VminSearch.PrimeVminSearchTestMethod.SearchExecutionStates.HasToAbortSearches
member.summary: Gets or sets a value indicating whether the search should abort execution.

member.name: P:Prime.TestMethods.VminSearch.PrimeVminSearchTestMethod.SearchExecutionStates.HasToRepeatSearch
member.summary: Gets or sets a value indicating whether the search should repeat an execution.

member.name: P:Prime.TestMethods.VminSearch.PrimeVminSearchTestMethod.SearchExecutionStates.RepetitionCount
member.summary: Gets or sets the repetition iteration count.

member.name: M:Prime.TestMethods.VminSearch.PrimeVminSearchTestMethod.SearchExecutionStates.Init
member.summary: Method to initialize states before overall searches execution.

member.name: M:Prime.TestMethods.VminSearch.PrimeVminSearchTestMethod.SearchExecutionStates.StartSearch
member.summary: Method to update states before each search execution.

member.name: M:Prime.TestMethods.VminSearch.PrimeVminSearchTestMethod.SearchExecutionStates.IncrementRepetition
member.summary: Increments repetition count.

member.name: M:Prime.TestMethods.VminSearch.PrimeVminSearchTestMethod.SearchExecutionStates.UpdateIsAnySearchPass(System.Boolean)
member.summary: Or current status with input status.
member.param: Search result to or against current value.

member.name: M:Prime.TestMethods.VminSearch.PrimeVminSearchTestMethod.SearchExecutionStates.SetHasToRepeat(System.Boolean)
member.summary: Set value to HasToRepeatSearch flag.
member.param: Input value to set.

member.name: M:Prime.TestMethods.VminSearch.PrimeVminSearchTestMethod.SearchExecutionStates.SetHasToAbort(System.Boolean)
member.summary: Set value to HasToAbortSearches flag.
member.param: Input value to set.

member.name: T:Prime.TestMethods.VminSearch.RepeatedVoltageTargetHandler
member.summary: Class for handling the repeated (ganged) voltage targets feature.

member.name: M:Prime.TestMethods.VminSearch.RepeatedVoltageTargetHandler.#ctor(System.Collections.Generic.IReadOnlyList{System.String})
member.summary: Initializes a new instance of the class.
member.param: Targets name list.

member.name: P:Prime.TestMethods.VminSearch.RepeatedVoltageTargetHandler.AreRepeatedTargets
member.summary: Gets a value indicating whether at least one target is repeated.

member.name: M:Prime.TestMethods.VminSearch.RepeatedVoltageTargetHandler.UpdateRepeatedVoltageTargets(System.Collections.Generic.List{System.Double})
member.summary: Updates the repeated/linked voltage targets with the rules of core linking/ganging.
member.param: Voltage values per target.
member.returns: List of voltages with updated values.

member.name: T:Prime.TestMethods.VminSearch.ScoreboardPointTest
member.summary: Class to handle all accumulated data for scoreboard.
Initializes a new instance of the class.
member.param: Functional object for plist execution options.
Scoreboard execution options.
Object of class which allows to apply the voltages.
Object of class which has all extension methods implemented.
IConsoleService reference.
The session context of this operation.

member.name: P:Prime.TestMethods.VminSearch.ScoreboardPointTest.CaptureTest
member.summary: Gets CaptureTest.

members.member:
Execute sb.
Accumulated results for each iteration in the search. Bit array containing the initial mask for each target. True indicates the bit is on and False indicates the bit is off.> Test instance name postfix. True if the search passed, false if it failed. True if search is a single point execution, meaning that the start voltage equals to end voltage limit.

member.name: M:Prime.TestMethods.VminSearch.ScoreboardPointTest.GenerateScoreboardCounters(System.String,Prime.FunctionalService.ICaptureFailureTest)
member.summary: Generates and print the Scoreboard Counters.
member.param: testName postfix for ituff printing.
Functional Failure test instance.

member.name: M:Prime.TestMethods.VminSearch.ScoreboardPointTest.ResolvePlist(System.String)
member.summary: Resolves plist for execution. If PUP methodology is enabled it might replace the original plist with the slim plist version. This is done in the functional service.
member.param: currently executed instance name to check if it is targeted for PUP.

member.name: T:Prime.TestMethods.VminSearch.ScoreboardPointTest.ScoreboardExecutionParameters
member.summary: Scoreboard point test execution settings.

member.name: P:Prime.TestMethods.VminSearch.ScoreboardPointTest.ScoreboardExecutionParameters.MaxFails
member.summary: Gets or sets the number of fails before the maximum number of fails is reported.

member.name: P:Prime.TestMethods.VminSearch.ScoreboardPointTest.ScoreboardExecutionParameters.EdgeTicks
member.summary: Gets or sets the number of resolutions to step down.

member.name: P:Prime.TestMethods.VminSearch.ScoreboardPointTest.ScoreboardExecutionParameters.BaseNumbers
member.summary: Gets or sets an integer number value to prefix the generated scoreboard fail counters.

member.name: P:Prime.TestMethods.VminSearch.ScoreboardPointTest.ScoreboardExecutionParameters.PatternNameMap
member.summary: Gets or sets a comma separated string of integers which map characters in the pattern name to produce a scoreboard counter.

member.name: P:Prime.TestMethods.VminSearch.ScoreboardPointTest.ScoreboardExecutionParameters.PrintScoreboardCounters
member.summary: Gets or sets a value indicating whether or not to print the scoreboard counters of the current instance object.

member.name: P:Prime.TestMethods.VminSearch.ScoreboardPointTest.ScoreboardExecutionParameters.PrintFailingExecutionInfo
member.summary: Gets or sets a value indicating whether or not to print the failing patterns execution info.

member.name: P:Prime.TestMethods.VminSearch.ScoreboardPointTest.ScoreboardExecutionParameters.ScoreboardFactory
member.summary: Gets or sets a scoreboard factory.

member.name: P:Prime.TestMethods.VminSearch.ScoreboardPointTest.ScoreboardExecutionParameters.IsStartOnFirstFailEnabled
member.summary: Gets or sets a value indicating whether start on first fail is enabled.

member.name: T:Prime.TestMethods.VminSearch.SearchIdentifiers
member.summary: Class to store the identifiers for each search.

member.name: M:Prime.TestMethods.VminSearch.SearchIdentifiers.#ctor(System.String,System.UInt32,System.UInt32)
member.summary: Initializes a new instance of the class.
member.param: String to be used as tname postfix to identify the current search.
Current multi pass count.
Current repetition count.

member.name: P:Prime.TestMethods.VminSearch.SearchIdentifiers.TnamePostfix
member.summary: Gets a string of the form MxRy. Where x is the multi pass execution count and y is the repetition count.

member.name: P:Prime.TestMethods.VminSearch.SearchIdentifiers.MultiPassCount
member.summary: Gets an unsigned integer identifying the number of multi pass execution.

member.name: P:Prime.TestMethods.VminSearch.SearchIdentifiers.RepetitionCount
member.summary: Gets an unsigned integer identifying the number of the repetition count.

member.name: T:Prime.TestMethods.VminSearch.SearchPointData
member.summary: A class to accumulate multi-pass results.

members.member:
Initializes a new instance of the class.
A list containing the search point voltages. Structure containing the data of the fail pattern.>

member.name: P:Prime.TestMethods.VminSearch.SearchPointData.Voltages
member.summary: Gets a list containing the resulting search voltages.

member.name: P:Prime.TestMethods.VminSearch.SearchPointData.FailPatternData
member.summary: Gets the fail pattern data.

member.name: T:Prime.TestMethods.VminSearch.SearchPointData.PatternData
member.summary: Struct containing pattern name, burst index and pattern Id to identify the fail pattern in each search.

member.name: F:Prime.TestMethods.VminSearch.SearchPointData.PatternData.PatternName
member.summary: String containing the pattern name.

member.name: F:Prime.TestMethods.VminSearch.SearchPointData.PatternData.BurstIndex
member.summary: Unsigned number containing the burst index.

member.name: F:Prime.TestMethods.VminSearch.SearchPointData.PatternData.PatternId
member.summary: Unsigned number containing the the pattern ID.

member.name: F:Prime.TestMethods.VminSearch.SearchPointData.PatternData.FailVector
member.summary: Unsigned number containing the the fail vector address.

member.name: M:Prime.TestMethods.VminSearch.SearchPointData.PatternData.#ctor(System.String,System.UInt32,System.UInt32,System.UInt64)
member.summary: Initializes a new instance of the struct.
member.param: Pattern name.
Burst index.
Pattern Id.
Fail vector address.

member.name: T:Prime.TestMethods.VminSearch.SearchPointTest
member.summary: Class to provide all behaviour to a search point object.
Initializes a new instance of the class.
member.param: Values to create the functional object for plist execution.
Contains the voltage related data needed in this test.
Object of class which has all extension methods implemented.
List of switches used to enable or disable specific features.
IConsoleService reference.
The session context of this operation.

member.name: P:Prime.TestMethods.VminSearch.SearchPointTest.CurrentState
member.summary: Gets object which contains all current state search values.

member.name: P:Prime.TestMethods.VminSearch.SearchPointTest.SearchPlist
member.summary: Gets the functional test object with plist execution settings.

member.name: P:Prime.TestMethods.VminSearch.SearchPointTest.StartVoltageKeys
member.summary: Sets startVoltageKeys.

member.name: P:Prime.TestMethods.VminSearch.SearchPointTest.EndVoltageLimitKeys
member.summary: Sets endVoltageLimitKeys.

member.name: P:Prime.TestMethods.VminSearch.SearchPointTest.LowerStartVoltageKeys
member.summary: Sets lowerStartVoltageKeys.

member.name: M:Prime.TestMethods.VminSearch.SearchPointTest.ResolvePlist(System.String)
member.summary: Resolves plist for execution. If PUP methodology is enabled it might replace the original plist with the slim plist version. This is done in the functional service.
member.param: currently executed instance name to check if it is targeted for PUP.
member.returns: Returns resolved plist.

member.name: M:Prime.TestMethods.VminSearch.SearchPointTest.Reset
member.summary: Resetting of all dynamic fields if applicable.
member.returns: Returns if reset was successful.

member.name: M:Prime.TestMethods.VminSearch.SearchPointTest.Execute
member.summary: Execute Search Plist Test Point.
member.returns: The status of the plist execution.

member.name: M:Prime.TestMethods.VminSearch.SearchPointTest.ProcessResults(System.Boolean)
member.summary: ProcessResults.
member.param: The status of the current search point.
member.returns: Represents a pass/fail result, pass=true only if all bits from PrecessPlistResults call are false.

member.name: M:Prime.TestMethods.VminSearch.SearchPointTest.IsSearchCompleted(System.Boolean@)
member.summary: Returns boolean field that is true only when the search algorithm has determined search is completed.
member.param: The status of the current search point.
member.returns: isSearchCompleted.

member.name: M:Prime.TestMethods.VminSearch.SearchPointTest.ApplyTestConditions
member.summary: Applies the test conditions of the related to the plist execution.

member.name: T:Prime.TestMethods.VminSearch.SearchResultData
member.summary: A class to accumulate multi-pass results.

members.member:
Initializes a new instance of the class.
Object to provide search point test information.> A struct containing the current search identifiers. A bool indicating whether the search passed or not.>
Gets a list containing the resulting voltages. >

member.name: P:Prime.TestMethods.VminSearch.SearchResultData.StartVoltages
member.summary: Gets a list containing the starting voltage values.

member.name: P:Prime.TestMethods.VminSearch.SearchResultData.EndVoltageLimits
member.summary: Gets a list containing the end voltage values.

member.name: P:Prime.TestMethods.VminSearch.SearchResultData.IsPass
member.summary: Gets a value indicating whether the multi-pass failed or passed.

member.name: P:Prime.TestMethods.VminSearch.SearchResultData.MaskBits
member.summary: Gets an array of bits values.

member.name: P:Prime.TestMethods.VminSearch.SearchResultData.VoltageLimitingPatterns
member.summary: Gets a list of strings containing the failing patterns per target.

member.name: P:Prime.TestMethods.VminSearch.SearchResultData.VoltageLimitingPatternsOccurrences
member.summary: Gets a list of failing patterns occurrences in the plist.

member.name: P:Prime.TestMethods.VminSearch.SearchResultData.VoltageLimitingPatternsBurstID
member.summary: Gets a list of failing patterns BurstID in the plist.

member.name: P:Prime.TestMethods.VminSearch.SearchResultData.ExecutionCount
member.summary: Gets a value indicating the execution count.

member.name: P:Prime.TestMethods.VminSearch.SearchResultData.PerTargetIncrements
member.summary: Gets a list containing the iterations per target.

member.name: P:Prime.TestMethods.VminSearch.SearchResultData.TnamePostfix
member.summary: Gets a string of the form MxRy. Where x is the multi pass execution count and y is the repetition count.

member.name: P:Prime.TestMethods.VminSearch.SearchResultData.MultiPassCount
member.summary: Gets an unsigned integer identifying the number of multi pass execution.

member.name: P:Prime.TestMethods.VminSearch.SearchResultData.RepetitionCount
member.summary: Gets an unsigned integer identifying the number of the repetition count.

member.name: P:Prime.TestMethods.VminSearch.SearchResultData.FailReason
member.summary: Gets a failing reason (if any) for logging purposes.

member.name: M:Prime.TestMethods.VminSearch.SearchResultData.SetLimitingPatterns(System.Collections.Generic.IReadOnlyList{Prime.TestMethods.VminSearch.SearchPointData})
member.summary: Selects the limiting pattern for each search target.
member.param: List containing the voltages, mask bits and fail pattern per point data.

member.name: T:Prime.TestMethods.VminSearch.SearchStateValues
member.summary: Class to store the identifiers for each search.

member.name: P:Prime.TestMethods.VminSearch.SearchStateValues.Voltages
member.summary: Gets or sets voltages to be applied for each target at current search point.

member.name: P:Prime.TestMethods.VminSearch.SearchStateValues.MaskBits
member.summary: Gets or sets an array containing the mask for each target at current search point.

member.name: P:Prime.TestMethods.VminSearch.SearchStateValues.StartVoltages
member.summary: Gets or sets a list of the start voltages per target.

member.name: P:Prime.TestMethods.VminSearch.SearchStateValues.EndVoltageLimits
member.summary: Gets or sets a list of the end voltage limit per target.

member.name: P:Prime.TestMethods.VminSearch.SearchStateValues.ExecutionCount
member.summary: Gets or sets the execution count.

member.name: P:Prime.TestMethods.VminSearch.SearchStateValues.PerTargetIncrements
member.summary: Gets or sets a list of the iterations per target.

member.name: P:Prime.TestMethods.VminSearch.SearchStateValues.PerPointData
member.summary: Gets or sets a list of the accumulated per point results.

member.name: P:Prime.TestMethods.VminSearch.SearchStateValues.FailReason
member.summary: Gets or sets a failing reason (if any) for logging purposes.

member.name: T:Prime.TestMethods.VminSearch.VoltageDataForSearchPointTest
member.summary: This class contains the voltage data needed for the search point object.

member.name: M:Prime.TestMethods.VminSearch.VoltageDataForSearchPointTest.#ctor(System.Double,System.Collections.Generic.IReadOnlyList{System.String})
member.summary: Initializes a new instance of the class.
member.param: Voltage value to increase if conditions are not met for search completion.
List of voltage targets, used for validation purposes.

member.name: P:Prime.TestMethods.VminSearch.VoltageDataForSearchPointTest.Targets
member.summary: Gets a list of voltage targets, used for validation purposes in the search point test.

member.name: P:Prime.TestMethods.VminSearch.VoltageDataForSearchPointTest.StepSize
member.summary: Gets a voltage value to increase in the search point test when conditions are not met for search completion.
